jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at upGrad
jsonLd.description:
upGrad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!
